query:
SELECT id           AS "id!: Uuid",
               handle       AS "handle!: String",
               display_name AS "display_name!: String"
        FROM   users
        WHERE  deleted_at IS NULL
          AND  (handle ILIKE $1 || '%' OR display_name % $1)
        ORDER BY (handle ILIKE $1 || '%') DESC, similarity(display_name, $1) DESC
        LIMIT  $2
